sentences.english: I took an airplane for the first time last summer.
I was excited but also a little scared.
When the plane took off my ears hurt a little.
sentences.korean: 비행기가 이륙했을 때 귀가 좀 아팠어요.

sentences.english: But I loved looking out the window at the clouds below.
sentences.korean: 하지만 창밖으로 아래 구름을 보는 게 좋았어요.

sentences.english: I want to fly again soon.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
